prestazioni: AMG M139 2.0L Inline-4 (engine code: M139LS) hybrid turbo upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and 3D-printed titanium wastegate actuator for 450+ hp at 2.2 bar boost (GT4 race spec limit)
Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with Lotus-specific valving, spherical bearing top mounts, and 24-position rebound damping for GT4 endurance racing compliance

AP Racing CP8660-4000 6-piston front / CP8660-3800 4-piston rear brake kit with 380mm front and 355mm rear 35mm thick two-piece rotors, paired with Ferodo DS3000 GT4-spec pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid
estetica: Lotus Motorsport GT4 carbon fiber front splitter with integrated dive planes (part #LME-22-001), designed for 120kg front downforce at 150mph
RML Group GT4-spec carbon fiber rear diffuser (part #RML-GT4-002) with 90mm Gurney flap and 3D-printed titanium mounting brackets for 180kg rear downforce at 150mph
Lotus Exclusive 'Hethel Edition' carbon fiber side skirts with integrated NACA ducts (part #LME-22-003) for AMG intercooler and differential cooler airflow optimization
